representatives directlyLocal CoverageReps who know Essex stationsFrequently Asked QuestionsHow many police stations are there in Essex?Essex Police operates custody suites at several key locations including Chelmsford (the main HQ custody), Southend, Colchester, Basildon, Harlow, and Grays. Like many forces, Essex has consolidated custody facilities into fewer, larger centres in recent years.How do I find a police station representative in Essex?Use our directory to search for accredited representatives covering Essex Police stations. You can filter by availability, view which stations they cover, and contact them directly. All listed representatives hold current PSRAS accreditation.What areas do Essex police station reps cover?Representatives in our Essex directory typically cover stations across Chelmsford, Southend, Colchester, Basildon, Harlow, Grays, Braintree, Clacton and surrounding areas. Many also cover neighbouring counties including London borders.Are Essex police station representatives available 24/7?Many representatives offer 24/7 availability. Our directory shows each representative's availability status so you can find someone who matches your needs.Are You a Police Station Representative in Essex?Join our directory for free and get discovered by criminal defence firms across the county.Register for Free Become Featured
